StepAction: Idle; provider awaiting next assistant turn request
WS streaming; A2 receives codex frames, A3 emits text-delta and tool-call parts as deltas arrive; counters emittedTextDeltas and emittedToolCalls accumulate
Run classifier on streamStateSnapshot + requestOptionsShape; derive {causeFamily, recoveryAction, suspectParams, logSequence}
Persist log entry: append JSONL line to <state>/codex/empty-turns.jsonl AND publish bus event on codex.emptyTurn; on write failure swallow and emit console.error breadcrumb
Apply recovery action selected by classifier
Condition: recoveryAction IN {pass-through-to-runloop-nudge, log-and-continue} OR retryAttempted == true

StepAction: Retry: WS reopens with same body; flip retryAttempted=true; cap at one attempt (DD-7); state.usage and counters reset for new attempt
Synthesize text part from accumulated deltas (DORMANT: no current cause family selects this; reserved for future codex shape changes per DD-8)

A3 emits finish part with providerMetadata.openai.emptyTurnClassification; A6 (runloop empty-response guard) fires broad question-mark nudge per D-4 and attaches classification metadata to the synthetic message
Normal completion: emit finish part with finishReason in {stop, tool-calls, length}; classifier was NOT invoked; no empty-turn metadata attached
Turn complete; runloop processes any nudge or normal finish; provider returns to idle
